category_sources: source_facts.description says HTML parser written in Java; official HtmlCleaner homepage describes an open source HTML parser that cleans ill-formed HTML into well-formed XML.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses HtmlCleaner; source_facts.name is htmlcleaner.
docs_sources: Official HtmlCleaner site provides Java code usage, command-line usage, and JavaDoc pages.
repo_sources: Official HtmlCleaner download page says latest source code may be checked out from the Subversion repository at https://svn.code.sf.net/p/htmlcleaner/code/trunk.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Java HTML parser; official homepage says it cleans dirty HTML and produces well-formed XML.
